text_block_list.text:
Toward our next dream… to confirm the
breathtaking view we should be aiming for,
we decided to attend the Japan Cup. And
there…

text_block_list.name: At the Crest
text_block_list.text: I'm off first～! I'll take the lead!

At the Crest, who had debuted in the same
race as Buena Vista, surges to the front,
setting a blistering pace.

The field is packed with G1 horsegirls,
including rising stars like her rival Red Desire,
all running with everything they have. And
then, the one who broke away was…

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uoooooooohhhh!!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Vodka takes the lead!
Vodka takes the lead!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Vodka…!

As Vodka charges toward the finish, her rivals
come storming after her…! And the one who
emerges victorious from that breathtaking
battle is…

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yessss…!! The strongest one out there… is me!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
As a Japanese Tiara horsegirl, the first ever to
conquer the Japan Cup! Once again, she has
proven her strength! A historic achievement!!
(Wooaaaaahhh!!)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
"That was incredible… Vodka…!"
"Congratulatioooons!!"
"Whoa, she changed how everyone thinks…!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
"That was incredible… Spe…!"
"Congratulatioooons!!"
"Whoa, she beat the world…!!"
choice_data_list: …This is the same view as back then.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
choice_data_list: Not exactly the same. But… they overlap.
Not exactly the same. But… they overlap.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…So this is it. This is what we've been aiming
for… What we have to aim for.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The color of the breathtaking view we've
dreamed of…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Hah… haaah…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Third place… How frustrating. And yet… and
yet…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Vodka…!! Ahh, what a magnificent person you
are…!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: If I was defeated by someone like you, then perhaps… even if that place has slipped farther away…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…It's as though I've been held back. Please
forgive me for how my heart races at the
thought…!

After witnessing the Japan Cup, Buena Vista's
eyes gleamed with renewed determination.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Vodka. The breathtaking views they
showed everyone were completely different…
And yet, they're alike.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Spe won as Japan's representative. Vodka
achieved something no one had ever done
before…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Right. The breathtaking view we're searching
for… it really is here.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We're chasing a breathtaking view that reaches
everyone. And if that's true…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Then showing everyone the kind of victory
they've been waiting for… the kind they've
dreamed of… that's what leads to a
breathtaking view. Just like today.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I want to answer the feelings everyone sent
me at the Shuka Sho. No… I want to show
them something even greater. Right here.
choice_data_list: Our ultimate goal… next year's Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that's where the dream that began
that day… will finally arrive.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. The two of us are going to reach it.
No matter what!

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: …Oh? Buena.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that you're here to watch the
Japan Cup as well?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hello! I am! Which means, Journey, you're
here too…?

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I came to observe. After all, it was the
grand stage of Vodka, the shining star of our
generation.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow～! So you came to cheer her on? That's
such a wonderful friendship♪

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… thank you. She truly was magnificent,
wasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Became the queen of her junior class, fulfilled
a dream coveted by everyone in racing… And
today, she etched another page into history.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Her achievements can't be confined to one
racing path. She goes wherever she pleases.
And I suspect… that's true for you as well.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! That's such an honor. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Journey is always so kind… she's always
looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all. She's simply the sort of person
one can't help wanting to look after.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
By the way… I hear you'll be running in the
Arima Kinen. As it happens, so will I.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Really!? I had no idea…!

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
You're rapidly becoming the center of this era.
So that I might bask in even a little of your
brilliance… I intend to give it everything I have.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm really happy I'll get to race against you,
Journey! I'll be giving it my all too!

Chasing after that breathtaking view of their
dreams… they renewed their resolve. First, at
the Arima Kinen.
